calendar.matters:
CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Feb-05-2025 Off Calendar

CRC 3.1385 ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Dec-11-2024 Continued To Mar-04-25 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Unopposed Notice Of Motion And Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Final Judgment And Injunction
Off Calendar Dec-03-2024 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances
JULIE WILENSKY, Esq., Deputy City Attorney (415) 554-4274 Julie.Wilensky@sfcityatty.org Attorney for Plaintiffs PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA and PEOPLE OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, acting by and through San Francisco City Attorney DAVID CHIU
Rohit A. Sabnis, Esq., KELLER & HECKMAN LLP (415) 948-2800 sabnis@khlaw.com Attorney for Defendants GASHIRO TECHNOLOGY LLC d/b/a The Vape Society CBD and The Vape Society (via Zoom Conference)

Matter is not contested. Plaintiff appears in court to request that plaintiff be allowed to file separate judgments as to two individual defendants. Court instucts counsel that only one judgment can be filed.

Matter is not argued. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PLAINTIFFS PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF CALIFORNIA, ACTING BY AND THROUGH SAN FRANCISCO ATTORNEY DAVID CHIU, and PEOPLE OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO's Unopposed Motion For Entry Of Stipulated Final Judgment And Injunction.

Plaintiffs' "unopposed motion for entry of stipulated final judgment and injunction" is granted.

Order signed.

Judge: Richard B. Ulmer; Clerk: W. Trupek; Not Reported (302/RBU)
